title: Slow-Mo Water Droplet
summary: Single water drop falling and crowning - extreme slow-motion macro.
prompt: An extreme slow-motion macro shot of a single perfect water droplet falling onto a still pool of water. The drop touches the surface, deforms into a crown, and a tiny secondary droplet leaps back upward. Crystal-clear water, dramatic side lighting picking up every refraction. Ultra-high frame rate, scientific-photography aesthetic. Pitch-black background.
